official_sources.finding: Bot API is HTTP-based and suitable for controlled bot/channel interactions, not a public social feed by itself.
Bot setup requires BotFather and broadcast limits apply; bulk notifications have rate limits and paid broadcast requirements.
X API supports publishing posts with pay-per-usage pricing.
X post creation uses POST /2/tweets for the authenticated user and requires user-token authorization.
X posting requires tweet.read, tweet.write, and users.read scopes.
LinkedIn sharing requires OAuth member authentication and w_member_social; creating a share uses the UGC API.
Google Business Profile local posts support scheduledTime and SIGN_UP style call-to-action, but are tied to a business location.
KakaoTalk message APIs are constrained to self or same-service users; friend messaging requires permissions and is not a general marketing broadcast path.
Naver Share is a web share helper for public URLs, not a server-side automatic blog publishing API.
Naver Cafe join/write API is OAuth-based and specific to cafe membership/posting, not Naver Blog publishing.

workflow_state_model.description: Copy is still sourced from MARKETING-MATERIALS-V1 and MARKETING-BRIEF.
A human-readable preview is created for review only.
Compliance Officer classifies financial, recommendation, paid-signal, tax, legal, regulatory, KIS, or performance claims.
Owner must approve a specific channel, account, content hash, schedule, and rollback path before any live post.
A local audit preview can be generated without OAuth, tokens, or network posting.
Default terminal state for this packet; live publication is not enabled.
Channel-specific delete/edit/share-withdrawal instructions must be reviewed before live use.

channel_policies.initial_recommendation: Use first for reviewed long-form dev logs or private previews; copy/paste remains Owner action.
channel_policies.rollback_instruction: Owner manually edits, unpublishes, or archives the post on the blog platform.

channel_policies.credential_boundary: Bot token and chat/channel ids must stay in secret storage, never repo files.
channel_policies.initial_recommendation: Useful for Owner-approved private channel updates or opt-in pilot notices; not a public discovery channel.
channel_policies.rollback_instruction: Delete the Telegram message or follow channel moderation flow from the Owner account.

channel_policies.credential_boundary: Developer app, OAuth user token, and billing/usage setup are Owner/R3.
channel_policies.initial_recommendation: Keep as reviewed draft only until cost, app permissions, tweet.write scope, link policy, and delete flow are confirmed.
channel_policies.rollback_instruction: Use the authenticated Owner account or API delete endpoint after Owner approval.

channel_policies.credential_boundary: OAuth member token and w_member_social scope are Owner/R3.
channel_policies.initial_recommendation: Consider for reviewed professional positioning after claim review; do not auto-post in v1.
channel_policies.rollback_instruction: Owner deletes or edits the LinkedIn share from the authenticated account.

channel_policies.initial_recommendation: Use only as a manual share helper after a public reviewed URL exists; it is not automatic Naver Blog publication.
channel_policies.rollback_instruction: Remove or update the source URL; Owner withdraws any manual share.

channel_policies.credential_boundary: Naver OAuth token, cafe membership, board permissions, and community rules are Owner/R3.
channel_policies.initial_recommendation: Do not use for marketing v1 unless a specific cafe, permission, and non-spam community policy are approved.
channel_policies.rollback_instruction: Owner deletes or edits the cafe post under the cafe's moderation rules.

channel_policies.credential_boundary: Kakao app, OAuth token, message permissions, and recipient consent are Owner/R3.
channel_policies.initial_recommendation: Do not treat as marketing broadcast; only consider Owner-approved self memo or consented same-service user messaging.
channel_policies.rollback_instruction: No reliable public rollback for received chat messages; avoid until policy and consent are reviewed.

channel_policies.credential_boundary: Google account, OAuth client, verified business profile/location, and business registration context are Owner/R3.
channel_policies.initial_recommendation: Defer until business registration/profile/location are intentionally set up.
channel_policies.rollback_instruction: Owner updates or deletes the local post from Google Business Profile tools/API.

required_reviews_before_live_use: Owner approval for the exact channel, account, content hash, schedule, and rollback path
Compliance Officer claim review for financial, performance, recommendation, paid-signal, model-portfolio, tax, legal, regulatory, or KIS wording
Provider policy review for every channel selected for live use
Secret-storage review before any OAuth token, bot token, app secret, channel id, or account id is handled
QA dry-run record showing no network calls or external mutations
Doc Steward review that the public copy still matches BUSINESS-PLAN.md and MARKETING-BRIEF.md

task_096_handoff.next_allowed_slice: local dry-run audit record generator without network calls, OAuth, tokens, live post, or external account action
owner_r3_required_for: posting, scheduling, editing, or deleting live content
